languages.original_text: "May the Throne be merciful to those whose souls endure the test of will in this hall. From weakness, O God-Emperor, deliver us all!"

languages.text: "Пусть Трон будет милостив к тем, чья душа проходит через испытание воли в этом чертоге. От слабости, Бог-Император, избавь нас!"
languages.translation_comment: The characters came to Medbay after the Rogue Trader banned the use of augmentations on the bodies of commoners.

languages.text: "May the Throne be merciful to those whose souls endure the test of will in this hall. From weakness, O God-Emperor, deliver us all!"

"May the Throne be merciful to those whose souls endure the test of will in this hall. From weakness, O God-Emperor, deliver us all!"

languages.text: 「この大聖堂で意志の試練に耐える魂に、神聖なる御座が慈悲を注ぎますように。弱さから、神皇帝よ、我々を救い給え！」
languages.original_text: "May the Throne be merciful to those whose souls endure the test of will in this hall. From weakness, O God-Emperor, deliver us all!"

traits.locale_text: この大聖堂で意志の試練に耐える魂に、神聖なる御座が慈悲を注ぎますように。弱さから、神皇帝よ、我々を救い給え！

languages.text: « Puisse le Trône faire preuve de clémence envers ceux dont la force d'âme est mise à l'épreuve dans ce lieu. Ô Empereur-Dieu, délivrez-nous tous de la faiblesse ! »
languages.original_text: "May the Throne be merciful to those whose souls endure the test of will in this hall. From weakness, O God-Emperor, deliver us all!"

traits.locale_text: « Puisse le Trône faire preuve de clémence envers ceux dont la force d'âme est mise à l'épreuve dans ce lieu. Ô Empereur-Dieu, délivrez-nous tous de la faiblesse ! »

languages.text: "Möge der Thron all den Seelen gnädig sein, die die Willensprobe in dieser Halle ertragen. Gottimperator, erlöse uns alle von unserer Schwäche!"
languages.original_text: "May the Throne be merciful to those whose souls endure the test of will in this hall. From weakness, O God-Emperor, deliver us all!"

traits.locale_text: "Möge der Thron all den Seelen gnädig sein, die die Willensprobe in dieser Halle ertragen. Gottimperator, erlöse uns alle von unserer Schwäche!"

languages.text: "Taht, bu salonda irade sınavına katlanan ruhlara merhamet etsin. Tanrı İmparator, hepimizi zayıflıktan kurtarsın!"
languages.original_text: "May the Throne be merciful to those whose souls endure the test of will in this hall. From weakness, O God-Emperor, deliver us all!"

traits.locale_text: "Taht, bu salonda irade sınavına katlanan ruhlara merhamet etsin. Tanrı İmparator, hepimizi zayıflıktan kurtarsın!"

languages.text: «Que el Trono se apiade de aquellos cuyas almas ponen a prueba su voluntad en esta estancia. ¡Oh, Dios Emperador, líbranos de toda debilidad!».
languages.original_text: "May the Throne be merciful to those whose souls endure the test of will in this hall. From weakness, O God-Emperor, deliver us all!"

traits.locale_text: «Que el Trono se apiade de aquellos cuyas almas ponen a prueba su voluntad en esta estancia. ¡Oh, Dios Emperador, líbranos de toda debilidad!».

languages.text: “愿黄金王座垂怜在这座殿堂中经受意志考验的灵魂。神皇啊，请将我们从软弱中解救出来吧！”
languages.original_text: "May the Throne be merciful to those whose souls endure the test of will in this hall. From weakness, O God-Emperor, deliver us all!"

traits.locale_text: “愿黄金王座垂怜在这座殿堂中经受意志考验的灵魂。神皇啊，请将我们从软弱中解救出来吧！”
